PARANOIA 
which has flashy fins and is styled like a Cor- vette; the energy pistol is much smaller, and tends in an antenna surrounded by rings. 
‘Malfunction: Rol the die. On an even roll, the ‘weapon stops working. On an odd roll it heats, up suddenly then vaporizes. In the latter case, the holder suffers damage; rll on the Damage Table — treat it as an "EB" attack 
Remedy: A successful weapon skill roll prevents vaporization, but the weapon is useless 
WW Needle Guns Needle guns look much like modern automatic hand guns, but appear to be made ‘of plastic. When the User presses a button on the handle, adoor opens to reveal a rol of tiny plastic flechettes, The weapon Is reloaded by removing the spool on which this roll is mounted and replacing it with a new one (much like replacing a typewriter or printer rib bon). When fired, the weapon separates the flechettes, and fires them in a steady stream. 
Malfunction: The plastic ammunition jams in the pressure chamber and the weapon may ex: plode. Roll the die. On an even roll, the ‘weapon is unusable, On an odd roll, it ex- plodes. In this case, rll for all beings within 1 meter on the Damage Table (reat it as a‘"P9" attack) 
Remedy: A successful weapon skill oll clears the jam and prevents an explosion, but the ‘weapon malfunction number decreases by 1 to 18) whenever fired thereafter 
Wi Hand Flamer Sort ofa mini-flamethrower; i fires a thin jet of flaming liquid at high velocity 
Malfunction: It may explode. Roll the die; if 
the rol is even, the weapon stops working. If the roll is odd, the weapon explodes; rol ‘damage for its wielder on the Damage Table (teat it as an “F8" attack), 
A traitor demonstrates the tangle. 
Remedy: Nothing can stop the weapon from ‘exploding, Ifthe weapon stops working, a suc ‘cessful weapon skill oll returns it to normal function, 
HT Stun Guns Stun guns do no damage. Instead, any liv. ing target which is hit is stunned for several ‘combat rounds; rol the die, halve the number rolled and round fractions down to determine how many rounds, During ths time, the target may not take any action, 
Malfunction: Ail beings within 5 meters are stunned (roll as above 0 determine the umber of rounds) 
Remedy: A successful weapon skill rol repairs the weapon, Ifa character attempts to repair the weapon and fails, he is knocked un conscious and the weapon is permanently busted 
Wi Tanglers 
‘A tangler throws a 4 meter adhesive rope, which wraps itself around the target and gradually contracts, It does no damage, but ‘when a target is hit, the gamemaster rolls on the Hit Location Table (Fold-Out B) to deter- mine the body location to which the tangler rope adheres. f the head is hit, the rope is, assumed to have wrapped around the target’s neck, and the target will die of strangulation 
Jn several rounds (roll the die to determine how ‘many) unless the rope is removed. The victim. ‘needs the aid of another to retiove it.but this, takes only one round. If any other body loca- tion is hit, that area is immobilized and the target loses its use, Again, he may remove the rope in one round with theaid of another, 
Malfunction: It stops working, 
Remedy: A successful weapon skill rol fies It. An unsuccessful rll means all the adhesive ropes burst out and stick to the character at tempting the repair. 
Heavy Weapons 
i Flamethrowers This Is your classic World War Ihtype flamethrower I's a prety devastating weapon; ‘on the other hand, It's of limited use in enclosed spaces (like, oops, most of Alpha Complex) because the stream has a habit of bouncing back when it hits an obstruction, ‘Also, they do have a nasty tendency to ex plode, and the user is strapped into the ‘weapon — hard to run when things go bad. 
Malfunction: It explodes. Roll for everyone within 5 meters on the Damage Table (teat as an F9 weapon), 
Remedy: A successful weapon skill roll prevents the explosion, but the weapon is useless 
Wl Gauss Guns Gauss guns project a violent electromag: netic flux which wreaks havoc on bots and electronic equipment. Organic beings do not suffer damage from gauss. guns. 
Malfunction: If the weapon malfunctions, it stops working — no other ill effects 
Remedy: A successful electronic engineering Skill roll fixes the weapon, 
i Plasma Generator 
‘A plasma. generator consists of a tank backpack which contains plasma held in a ‘magnetic bottle, a magnetically-sealed hose which leads from the backpack to a hand pro- jector, and a shield which protects the firer from the hand projector. When fired, a ball of plasma (superheated gas) is emitted from the hand projector, and travels forward from the fires, expanding as it moves. Each combat round, the ball moves 5 meters forward,
